- From that point, if your Arachne's burst is ready, you do the Arachne shenanigans 
- If you're one card away from ultra turn, you use the other mirage to put it into the ultra space and burst during ultra turn 
- If you're running Casiah, you have the option to put the other mirage into the ultra space and then pull it back via Telekinesis 

You pick either poison or counter mirage options, depending on your arithmetica and enemy intentions

- Daffodil really appreciates strenth, so getting more is always a good idea
- Lasthitting things with Daffodil is not very important
